$comment: D-P7 universal ingest playbook specification — Spaarke Insights Engine Phase 1 (task 040). Realized in code by IngestOrchestrator under Services/Ai/Insights/Ingest/ rather than as a Dataverse playbook entity row, because the ingest sequence is fixed across all documents (cheap-gates-expensive D-59) and does not benefit from the playbook-as-data configurability that drives Dataverse playbooks. This JSON sits alongside layer1-classification.node.json + layer2-outcome-extraction.node.json as the documented contract; the orchestrator is the executable implementation.
name: Universal document ingest
$comment-trigger: D-P8 SPE-upload consumer (Wave 6 task 050) — every document uploaded to an SPE drive flows through this playbook via IInsightsAi.RunIngestAsync. NOT triggered by API call from end users; consumer-only.
$comment-cache: Zero per SPEC + POML §step 3 — ingest is one-shot. Idempotency comes from Observation.Id determinism (subject + field + document) + MergeOrUpload semantics in ObservationIndexUpserter, not from caching.

sequence.name: FetchDocumentContent
sequence.$comment: Reads chunks from spaarke-files-index (SDAP-system index, not the Insights derived index) filtered by documentId + tenantId. Returns null for documents not yet indexed (zero-byte uploads, unsupported file types) — orchestrator early-returns with empty result (NOT an error). Does NOT re-fetch from SPE.

sequence.name: Sanitize
sequence.$comment: Mechanical, zero-LLM. Strips control characters, collapses runs of whitespace, removes recognized prompt-injection prefixes, caps total length to 200K chars. Preserves case + punctuation + accents so downstream GroundingVerifier (Step 8) can still verify verbatim quotes.

sequence.name: Layer1Classification
sequence.$comment: Cheap classification call per D-59 economics. 8-value enum + numeric confidence + one-sentence reasoning. Constrained decoding via IOpenAiClient.GetStructuredCompletionRawAsync; validated by the schema field; deserialized to Layer1ClassificationResult.

sequence.name: EmitLayer1Observation
sequence.$comment: ONE Observation per document. Subject = document; predicate = 'classification'; producedBy = 'playbook://classification@v1', version = 'v1'. Side-effect: upsert to spaarke-insights-index + invoke IObservationMirror (D-P11 seam; NoOp until task 051).

sequence.name: GateLayer2
sequence.$comment: Conditional: only run Layer 2 when classification ∈ {closing_letter, settlement_agreement, opinion_judgment} AND confidence ≥ 0.7. Other classifications skip Layer 2 entirely (the gate makes universal ingest economical). Implementation: DocumentClassificationExtensions.IsOutcomeBearing predicate + Layer2GateMinConfidence constant.

sequence.name: Layer2OutcomeExtraction
sequence.$comment: Conditional on Step 5 passing. Extracts outcomeCategory + settlementAmount + outcomeDate + matterDurationDays with per-field verbatim quotes + per-field confidence + keyTerms. Validated by OutcomeExtractionResponseValidator before downstream gates run; on validation failure, returns with Layer 1 Observation only (no retry — IOpenAiClient already has constrained-decoding + 1 retry).

sequence.name: ValidateLayer2
sequence.$comment: Mechanical schema + invariant validation. Rejects: out-of-enum outcomeCategory, negative settlementAmount, malformed ISO date, malformed ISO 4217 currency, fields where 'value non-null but quote null' or 'value null but quote non-null', confidence outside [0.0, 1.0]. Surviving response feeds the grounding step.

sequence.name: GroundingVerify
sequence.$comment: Mechanical (zero-LLM) verbatim or sliding-window-approximate substring match of each field's quote against the original document chunks (NOT the sanitized text). Verdicts: Verified | VerifiedApproximate → field passes; NotFound | NoQuote | InvalidInput → field is DROPPED before confidence-threshold gating (logged for the D-P11 review surface).

sequence.name: ConfidenceThreshold
sequence.$comment: Per-field threshold from IOptionsMonitor<ConfidenceThresholdOptions> bound to Insights:Extraction:ConfidenceThresholds. Phase 1 starters: outcomeCategory≥0.75, settlementAmount≥0.85, outcomeDate≥0.85, matterDurationDays≥0.75. Below-threshold fields are DROPPED (and logged for D-P11 drift dashboard).

sequence.name: EmitLayer2Observations
sequence.$comment: ONE Observation per surviving field per D-P10. Subject = matter; predicate = field name; value = extracted typed value (JsonElement); evidence = [{document + verbatim quote}, {playbook-run ref}]; producedBy = 'playbook://outcome-extraction@v1', version = 'v1'. Side-effect (via upsertAsync callback): substrate write + mirror.

sequence.name: ObservationIndexUpsert
sequence.$comment: Embeds the Observation's content field (predicate + value + first-quote concatenation) via IOpenAiClient.GenerateEmbeddingAsync (text-embedding-3-large @ 3072 dims per SPEC §3.4 / D-P2) and MergeOrUpload to spaarke-insights-index. THE substrate write — failures propagate to the D-P8 consumer for dead-letter.

sequence.name: ObservationMirror
sequence.$comment: Phase 1: NoOpObservationMirror logs but does not write. Phase 1.5+: DataverseObservationMirror (task 051) writes sprk_analysis rows for the review surface. Per IObservationMirror contract, mirror failures are NON-FATAL — orchestrator logs and continues. Substrate write (Step 11) is the system-of-record.

downstreamProducers.produces: ZERO to FOUR Observations per document (one per surviving outcomeCategory/settlementAmount/outcomeDate/matterDurationDays field after gates)

consumers.name: D-P8 SPE-upload consumer
consumers.$comment: Triggers this playbook for every document uploaded to an SPE drive. Calls via IInsightsAi.RunIngestAsync (Zone B-safe facade).

consumers.name: D-P14 synthesis playbook
consumers.$comment: Consumes the Observations this playbook emits (via IndexRetrieveNode against spaarke-insights-index).

consumers.name: D-P11 review surface
consumers.$comment: Consumes the sprk_analysis mirror rows this playbook produces (via DataverseObservationMirror once task 051 ships).
